title: koeleria caudulata
intro: Koeleria caudulata, also known as the tall hair grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of the world, particularly in Asia and Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Koeleria caudulata include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are commonly used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
